name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the learning experience or project structure
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or opportunity

What is missing or what could be improved?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Why it matters

Explain how this helps learners, contributors, or maintainers.

## Additional context

Links, references, screenshots, or examples.
